summary: Verified Dashboard enhancements with expanded Quick Stats widget and Finance Suite navigation. All 20 stat cards render correctly for super_admin role (4 primary sales + 4 primary CS + 4 finance + 4 extended sales + 4 extended CS). Lead Funnel and Payment Methods charts display properly. All 6 Finance modules navigate correctly.

minor.issue: 401 errors logged when navigating between finance modules - likely session/cookie re-sync, pages load correctly

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with all 20 stat cards visible for super_admin role
Primary Sales stats visible: Total Leads (4), Hot Leads (0), Enrolled Today (0), SLA Breaches (4)
Primary CS stats visible: Total Students (2), New Students (0), Activated (2), Upgrade Eligible (0)
Finance stats visible: Total Revenue (AED 0), Pending Payments (0), Verified (0), Discrepancies (0)
Extended Sales stats visible: Conversion Rate (50%), Avg Deal Size (AED 0), Total Enrolled (2), Commission (Month) (AED 0)
Extended CS stats visible: Onboarding Rate (0%), Upgrade Pitched (0), Upgrades Closed (0), Avg Satisfaction (-)
Lead Funnel chart renders correctly with bar chart showing New Lead and Enrolled stages
Payment Methods chart renders correctly (shows 'No payment data available' when empty)
Recent Leads section displays lead activity with TestLead entries
Finance Entity Selector page loads at /finance with all 6 module cards
CLT Finance module renders with sidebar (Payables, Receivables, Journal Entries, etc.)
Back to Finance Suite button present in finance module layouts

charts.lead_funnel: PASS - Bar chart rendered with stage distribution
charts.payment_methods: PASS - Pie chart section present, shows empty state message when no data

seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard Quick Stats widget fully implemented with 20 stat cards for super_admin role arranged in 3 rows. Primary grid (row 1-3) shows Sales, CS, and Finance stats. Extended grid (row 4-5) shows additional Sales and CS metrics. Charts (Lead Funnel, Payment Methods) and Recent Leads section all functional. Finance Suite navigation verified with all 6 modules (CLT, Miles, Treasury, Budgeting, PNL, Data Management) navigating correctly from /finance selector.
testing_method: Playwright browser automation with login authentication
